name: nature-workflow
description: Nature research skills with lightweight workflow tracking, paper memory, and optional reusable prose-style profiles.

interface.shortDescription: Nature research workflows with optional prose-style profiles.
interface.longDescription: Nature workflow packages the usable skills from Yuan1z0825/nature-skills, preserves shared skill dependencies, and adds a small docs/nature-workflows state system for progress, paper-level memory, and explicitly requested reusable prose-style profiles. A single usable profile is selected automatically; multiple profiles require the user to choose before writing or polishing continues. Individual nature-* skills remain the primary entrypoints.
defaultPrompt: Start a Nature workflow for this paper.
Create an optional reusable prose-style profile from my full manuscript.
